name: Canvas Storage Bin Set Light Brown - Brightroom™: Desk & Office Organizers, Polyester Canvas, , 2-Pack
description:
Help keep your desk organized with the help of this Canvas Storage Bin Set from Brightroom™. This pack includes two cube-shaped storage boxes featuring a shallow design for organizing an array of everyday office essentials such as loose paper, notepads, clips or other stationery items. Designed with removable lids for keeping the contents hidden as well as for stacking multiple boxes, these canvas storage boxes feature a tag on the front to help you easily sort and identify the contents. Showcasing a canvas construction in a light brown hue, these storage boxes add sleek style and organization to any space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
